title: UltimateCustomCrafts
description: Unleash Creativity: Easily Craft Custom Recipes in Minecraft with Our Plugin!
body:
# Ultimate Custom Crafts
### Languages Supported: English, Russian, Ukraine, Chinese, German, Kazakh, French, Spanish
Unlock limitless crafting possibilities in Minecraft with our Custom Recipes Plugin! Easily create and manage custom recipes to enhance your gameplay. Use 
```
/ucc load
```
 to load recipe from file, 
```
/ucc unload
```
 to unload recipe from file, and 
```
/ucc reload
```
 to reload plugin. Perfect for players and server admins looking to customize their Minecraft experience!
For made a recipe you need to make recipe file in recipes package. 
## Example of recipe file you an find in package recipses
